g.text: Sequential flow with error gates — on failure, initialized modules receive on_shutdown()
Topological sort by dependencies; instantiate all modules
Env-only; DB-stored secrets not yet visible
Create schema if not exists; open asyncpg pool
Per-module migration branches; non-fatal (failed modules disabled)
Adapter init; verify runtime binary exists on PATH
12. Create FastMCP SSE Server + Register Core Tools
Instantiate FastMCP; bind all core tool handlers
Non-fatal per-module; failed modules skip tool registration
13b. Apply Approval Gates to Gated Tools
Wrap configured tool handlers with approval middleware
14. Start FastMCP SSE Server on Configured Port
Begin accepting MCP connections from LLM CLI instances
[NON-SWITCHBOARD ONLY] POST heartbeats to Switchboard endpoint
